falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 before any new 30-day high
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 80% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug would be broken, as that bottom held with no lower lows; this would confirm a lower low structure and invalidate the bottoming thesis

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 41 suggests elevated but contained stress; sustained VIX >35 indicates panic escalation beyond the pattern's resolution, proving the signal was not a bottom but a breakdown

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts deeper than -50bps (more negative)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The current signal assumes macro stabilization; a sharply widening inversion indicates recession acceleration, invalidating the 'bottom' pattern which occurred during soft-landing conditions in Aug 2024

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
